title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: the lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, usable in Node or browsers via the same REST endpoints.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; pip-installable wrapper around the local REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration that adds Ollama as a local LLM provider for chains, agents and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for any Ollama model; runs in Docker and supports multi-user, RAG, plugins.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Terminal UI (TUI) for chatting with Ollama models, written in Go; supports conversation history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-cli clone that uses a local Ollama model instead of OpenAI for shell command suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support, configurable models and ingress.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; provides synchronous & reactive APIs and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Docker-Compose, GPU tuning, RAG examples, CI/CD and more.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat, generate code or docs using any Ollama model without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API with ActiveModel-style interfaces and streaming support.

title: ollama-talk-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local LLM chat and note Q&A powered by Ollama into your vault.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Official curated model library (Llama 2, Mistral, CodeLlama, Gemma, etc.) with one-command pull/push.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) plus compose examples for running Ollama containerized.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host a Discord bot that answers users with any Ollama model; supports slash commands and conversation threads.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app to chat with local Ollama models, includes streaming replies and thread support.

title: ollama-mistral-bridge
summary: Example repo showing how to package and run Mistral 7B with Ollama, including custom Modelfile tuning.

title: ollama-rag-example
summary: Minimal Retrieval-Augmented Generation demo using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat over PDFs.

title: ollama-gpu-bench
summary: Community benchmark scripts to measure tokens/sec across GPUs and quantizations for popular Ollama models.
